description_long: This lamppost features a classic, Victorian-inspired design with a tall, slender black pole and a robust, square base adorned with subtle ornamental details. The lamp head is enclosed in a frosted glass globe, segmented by vertical metal ribs, and topped with a domed, bronze-colored cap and a decorative finial. The transition between the pole and the lamp head includes a small ornamental ring, adding to its vintage aesthetic. The base appears to be made of cast metal, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The overall finish is a combination of matte black and antique bronze, giving it a timeless, urban appeal. This lamppost would be well-suited for sidewalks, parks, or historic neighborhoods.
description: A tall, vintage-style lamppost with a frosted glass globe lamp head, black pole, and bronze accents, featuring subtle decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate base, and the segmented frosted glass globe with bronze cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical ribs of the lamp head and the ornamental transition ring below the globe.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the robust square base and the classic proportions of the pole and lamp head.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the lamp head and the consistent decorative elements around the base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian-style frosted glass globe with vertical metal ribs and a domed bronze cap topped by a finial
